title: Fear Of Survival - Horror
description: A horror modpack with famous dwellers
body:
**Fear of Survival** In the unrelenting darkness, the rules of Minecraft no longer apply. The Dwellers have risen, Beings born from nightmares, whispering through the shadows and crawling into your waking thoughts. Their glowing eyes pierce the blackness, their guttural sounds echoing closer with each heartbeat. They are predators, thriving on your fear and despair.

1.20.1 is avaible now! (Beta Only)
